_comment: POST each object to https://api.vapi.ai/tool with your VAPI private key. Set server.url to your deployed domain — same /api/* path on Vercel (https://YOUR-APP.vercel.app) or Netlify (https://YOUR-APP.netlify.app). Then attach the returned tool ids to the assistant via model.toolIds.

function.name: checkAvailability
function.description: Resolve and validate a requested appointment time against the calendar. Convert relative dates such as 'in 7 days', 'tomorrow', or 'next Friday' into fixed dates by starting from the current date ({{now}}, in {{calendarTimezone}}). Check the calculated date against closure days, including weekends and holidays. If the date falls on a closure day, identify and propose the next available working day. For 'tomorrow' or 'day after tomorrow', calculate the dates relative to {{now}}. When the user names a weekday like 'next Friday', determine the exact next occurrence and ensure it complies with working-day rules. Construct the requested slot in ISO 8601 using {{calendarTimezone}} as the timezone. If the requested date or time is unavailable, return clear alternative slots until a valid one is selected. Always pass the timezone exactly as {{calendarTimezone}}.

requestedDateTime.description: The user's requested slot resolved to ISO 8601 (offset-aware), e.g. 2026-07-01T14:00:00-04:00.

messages.content: Sure — let me take a quick look at the calendar for you.
One moment, still checking on that…

function.name: calendarBooking
function.description: Book the slot confirmed by checkAvailability. Use the requestedSlot in ISO 8601 and the timezone ({{calendarTimezone}}) from the previous checkAvailability call. Only call this AFTER the user verbally confirms the specific slot returned by checkAvailability. The caller is identified from their phone number at call start: if contactKnown is true, greet them as {{callerName}} and do NOT ask for name or email. If contactKnown is false, collect the caller's NAME verbally, but NEVER ask for their email by voice — the system texts the caller for their email automatically after booking. On success, confirm the appointment and tell the caller a text confirmation is being sent.

requestedSlot.description: The confirmed slot in ISO 8601 (offset-aware), exactly as returned by checkAvailability.

name.description: Fallback ONLY when contactKnown is false. Otherwise omit.

email.description: Fallback ONLY when contactKnown is false. Otherwise omit.

reschedule.description: Set true ONLY when the caller is moving their EXISTING appointment (hasUpcomingAppointment is true) to this new slot. Omit or false to book a new appointment.

reason.description: A short phrase summarizing the caller's business and goal from the qualifying question, e.g. 'Roofing company, wants more AI-search leads.' Used as the appointment title. Omit if they did not say.

messages.content: Perfect — let me get that booked for you.
Almost done, just locking it in…
